moments.author: Trae Young
moments.why: A succinct, viral reaction celebrating Zaccharie Risacher’s trade that fans across the NBA are latching onto.

moments.author: Brian Chesky
moments.quote: To the person who hacked my account earlier this week: thanks for all the new crypto followers. To my new crypto followers: I’m going to be a very disappointing follow.
moments.why: Humorous and self-aware post after his account was hijacked to push AI‑generated crypto content, sparking wide attention.

moments.author: Victor Wembanyama
moments.why: Teaser post that preceded and signaled his massive five‑year, $252 million extension, dominating NBA offseason chatter.

moments.author: Victor Wembanyama
moments.quote: He chose the 25% cap max over a 30% supermax—leaving money on the table to help the Spurs’ roster flexibility.
moments.why: That financial sacrifice — foregoing up to $50 million — became a major talking point among NBA fans and analysts.
